mapper.sql: A.SMENU_ID, A.SUP_MENU_ID ,A.SMENU_NM, A.SMENU_HIER_TYPE_CD, A.NMENU_LVL_SEQ , A.NMENU_INDC_ODRG, A.SMENU_DESC_SBST, A.SSCRN_ID, A.SMENU_GROUP_ID , A.SMENU_USE_YN, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , A.SCOMMENT
,B.SSCRN_NM AS SSCRN_NM ,B.SSCRN_URL_ADR AS SSCRN_URL_ADR ,B.SSCRN_USE_YN AS SSCRN_USE_YN ,C.SMENU_NM AS SUP_MENU_NM
AND A.SSCRN_ID = B.SSCRN_ID(+) AND A.SUP_MENU_ID = C.SMENU_ID(+)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_MENU_BAS A
ORDER BY A.NMENU_INDC_ODRG ASC

SELECT
count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_MENU_BAS A
